title: EarthboundMod
description: Adds a nostalgic EarthBound-style system to Minecraft.
body:
EarthBound Mod - A Mother 2-Inspired Experience for Minecraft!

Bring the nostalgic charm and unique mechanics of the classic RPG EarthBound (Mother 2) directly into your Minecraft world! This mod introduces custom elements inspired by the game, enhancing your survival and adventure.

✨ Key Features
Custom HUD: Replaces the standard Minecraft health and hunger display with a vibrant, EarthBound-style HUD.

Includes special visual indicators for ailments and hardcore mode (earthboundhud_ailment.png, earthboundhud_dead.png).

PSI Abilities & Items: Utilize familiar items and powers from the game.

Items: Look out for classic food items like the Steaksand and custom projectiles for PSI attacks like PK Fire and PK Freeze.

Status Effects: Beware of new status effects, such as the visual for Mushroom Confusion.
